title: TrendLens
hero.headline: Find places rising or falling on Google Maps.
hero.subheadline: TrendLens scans Google Maps reviews and detects places getting hot — or losing momentum — before everyone notices.
hero.supplement: Search any city and category. We analyze recent review signals, rating movement, and review language to find what is changing.
